ad_creative.headline: 🚨 仅剩10个名额！免费AI演示
mandatory_elements: Local examples: Hartamas Real Estate, WITO Technology

z_image_prompts.prompt: Malaysian SME owner celebrating success, chatbot interface visible, WhatsApp icon, text overlay in Chinese: 🚨 仅剩10个名额！免费AI演示
Infographic style, Malaysian flag colors, chatbot icon, feature highlights in Chinese, dark blue gradient background

production_table.visual: Chatbot interface animation, WhatsApp chat bubbles
WhatsApp number glowing, Malaysian flag overlay

audience_targeting.retargeting: Lead form submitters, WhatsApp clickers, High-intent users

cost_saving_strategies: Kill ads with CTR < 1% (TOFU) / CPL > RM20 (MOFU) / CPA > RM50 (BOFU) within 48h
Test 3-5 ad variations per funnel stage
Reuse TOFU video for MOFU/BOFU (just change text overlay)
Batch-create 5-10 variations in one session (reduce design time by 70%)
